stemHtml: Before departure, the pilot-in-command must ensure that the cabin is secure. How can the check of "cabin secure" be done?

options.a: The commander must personally perform the “cabin secure” check visually, to make sure passengers are seated and luggage is properly stowed.
options.b: The commander must personally perform the “cabin secure” check, to confirm that all luggage is properly stowed.
options.c: The commander gives the task to secure the cabin to cabin crew who check all luggage is properly stowed, and the cabin crew will give confirmation when it’s done.
options.d: Only a pilot can confirm that the exits and corridor are unobstructed and all luggage is properly stowed.
